description.value:
Ammunition sabot flechettes (10 gp, 5 Bulk)

Usage mounted;

Space 30 feet long, 20 feet wide, 12 feet high

Crew 3 to 4; Proficiency martial

AC 30; Fort +22, Ref +16

Hardness 15, HP 200 (BT 100);

Immunities object immunities

Speed 5 feet (pushed or pulled)

Unearthed from Jistkan ruins at Rachikan, this siege weapon with a tornado motif carved into the barrel has been repaired for modern use. The barrel creates a vortex of air that propels the loaded projectile: a Chelaxianengineered metal sabot containing fin-stabilized flechettes, achieving greater ranges and devastation than its Jistkan inventors likely ever dreamed possible.

Aim 3 rotate 45°

Load 3 (manipulate) 2 times, requires a successful @Check[arcana|dc:21], @Check[athletics|dc:21], @Check[nature|dc:21], or @Check[religion|dc:21]check

Launch 1 (attack, manipulate) 9d10 piercing, @Template[type:line|distance:250], @Check[reflex|dc:31], ignores 5 points of an object's Hardness
